product_analysis.material: paper gift box with metallic accents
product_analysis.label_structure: front-centered hero label with secondary side panels

style_architecture.style_theme: premium tea gift box visual world with restrained contemporary still-life styling
color_strategy: keep red as the only saturated visual center
background palette stays in ivory, linen, warm gray, pale wood, and stone
lighting_strategy: main light direction fixed at upper-left
soft directional commercial light with clean edge definition
text_strategy: every shot must reserve an explicit clean text safe zone
global_negative_rules: do not redesign the package structure

shots.title: Brand Hero
shots.purpose: Establish the premium gift box as the brand-defining hero image.
shots.composition_hint: Product centered or slightly lower, leave a clean upper text zone.
shots.copy_goal: Show brand recognition and premium tea gift box value.
shots.goal: Make the package the only saturated hero subject in the frame.
shots.scene_direction: restrained premium tabletop scene with desaturated background tones around the red package
shots.composition_direction: Keep the product stable, front-facing or 3/4, and reserve a clean upper-right safe zone for copy.
required_subjects: front-centered hero label with secondary side panels

shots.title: Carry Action
shots.purpose: Show a natural hand-carry or gift handoff moment without losing product lock.
shots.composition_hint: Action direction determines the opposite-side text safe zone.
shots.copy_goal: Convey real-life portability, gifting, and premium usability.
shots.goal: Show restrained human interaction while keeping the package clearly recognizable.
shots.scene_direction: clean lifestyle moment with muted background and restrained wardrobe colors
shots.composition_direction: Let the action move in one direction and leave clean negative space on the opposite side for text.

shots.title: Open Box Structure
shots.purpose: Explain the package opening logic and internal structure.
shots.composition_hint: Open box angle with safe zone at top or top_right.
shots.copy_goal: Highlight gift-box structure, opening experience, and material value.
shots.goal: Reveal the opening structure clearly without redesigning any internal layout.
shots.scene_direction: controlled premium tabletop with minimal props and clean structural read
shots.composition_direction: Use a stable top or 3/4 angle and keep a clean safe zone above or top_right.
required_subjects: inner tray or inner contents layout

shots.title: Dry Leaf Detail
shots.purpose: Show tea leaf quality and texture while keeping package linkage.
shots.composition_hint: Detail composition with a background clean area for copy.
shots.copy_goal: Convey dry leaf quality, texture, and authenticity.
shots.goal: Connect the tea leaf detail with the same world as the package hero.
shots.focus: dry leaf texture and package relationship
shots.scene_direction: macro-friendly detail scene with muted surfaces and one or two restrained tea props
shots.composition_direction: Place the dry leaf detail near the product or packaging cue and preserve a clear background safe zone.

shots.title: Tea Soup Experience
shots.purpose: Show brewed tea experience with a calm premium feeling.
shots.composition_hint: Tea soup vessel stable, text safe zone at top.
shots.copy_goal: Convey aroma, warmth, and tea drinking experience.
shots.goal: Show tea soup color and drinking mood with the package still tied to the scene.
shots.focus: tea soup vessel and package cue
shots.scene_direction: premium brewed tea setting with desaturated background and unified prop family
shots.composition_direction: Keep the tea vessel stable, maintain a clean upper safe zone, and avoid clutter behind the liquid.

specs.goal: Make the package the only saturated hero subject in the frame.

must_not_change: front-centered hero label with secondary side panels

specs.subject_prompt: Use the uploaded product as the exact hero subject. Keep the full package clearly recognizable as the primary visual center.
specs.package_appearance_prompt: Keep package type gift_box, primary color red, material paper gift box with metallic accents, label structure front-centered hero label with secondary side panels unchanged. Do not redesign package proportions, surface graphics, or brand texts.
specs.composition_prompt: Keep the product stable, front-facing or 3/4, and reserve a clean upper-right safe zone for copy. Preferred text-safe zone: top_right.
specs.background_prompt: desaturated neutral backgrounds only; keep texture subtle and commercial. Background must stay low saturation so the product remains the only saturated visual center.
specs.lighting_prompt: main light direction fixed at upper-left; soft directional commercial light with clean edge definition. Keep the lens language consistent: 50mm full-frame commercial lens feel; consistent moderate depth of field. Shot type: hero_brand.
specs.style_prompt: premium tea gift box visual world with restrained contemporary still-life styling | 50mm full-frame commercial lens feel | consistent moderate depth of field | tea tray | linen | neutral ceramic ware | muted wood accents. keep the full set visually unified.
specs.quality_prompt: high-end commercial e-commerce photography, premium material fidelity, stable composition, clean product edges
negative_prompt: do not redesign the package structure

layout_constraints.subject_placement_hint: stable hero package with clean upper-area copy zone
